lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [surprised] Wait, did you hear that? I think the cat knocked something over again.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [sighs] Which shelf was it this time?

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: The one with the plants. [worried] The big ceramic pot is on the floor.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [angry] That cat is on thin ice.
